title: Digital Marketing Copy for a New Product
scenario: Write a digital marketing copy for a new eco-friendly product targeting 25-50-year-old environmentally conscious consumers.
constraints: Must include at least 2 key benefits of the product
Use a persuasive and informative tone

evaluationCriteria.description: Verify that the copy accurately highlights the product's key benefits and features.
Check if the tone is persuasive and informative throughout the copy.
Assess if the copy accurately targets the 25-50-year-old environmentally conscious consumer persona.
